driver_module.stderr: modinfo: ERROR: Module nvidia not found.

assessment: OpenPI venv includes JAX CUDA plugin packages.
OpenPI venv includes a CUDA-enabled PyTorch build.
Host does not expose /dev/nvidia* device nodes.
Kernel NVIDIA driver module is not installed or not discoverable via modinfo.
PyTorch currently sees zero CUDA devices.
Assessment: the OpenPI Python environment is GPU-capable, but the host NVIDIA driver stack is absent or non-functional, so inference is forced onto CPU.
